TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Guo Jiaxin Simpu == Simedan ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu i pinanaman ci Chen Ju. Guo Jiaxin Simpu(Fr. Ronald J Boccieri)o nai "Mikapotay to mapadesay tamdaw" a kaciangilan i Maryknoll kiwkay, i 1968 miheca Simpu no Puxin Luo loma' i Pusin no Canghua, mafana' pasowal tono Payrang a sowal, malatosaay ko sician kaitira i Luo loma' no Canghua. I 1977 miheca 6 folad 23 romi'ad, sarakatay marepet no Komintang sifo kako, palafinen, dipotan kako to cecay lipay, pasowal ci Guo Jiaxin Simpu: "Palemedaen no Wama kiso, sa'icelen iso haw." saan. I 1978 miheca, nawhani misoped kako to ngangan no marofoay to sician ato nikapolongan onto a ratoh patayra i roma kitakit, o milinikay imeng ato misolapay mirepet i takowanan, saka miliyaw haca kako milimok tayra i Luo loma' Tinsokiw kiwkay i Canghua. Ikor, marepat kako, na ikoran tonini caay to kanga'ay no Simpu tayni Taywan, tangasa 1987 miheca, itira to kami i New York masaso'araw. I 2000 miheca mafafalic ko sasiiked csician, manga'ay to ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu tayni i Taywan miliso' takuwan, caay ko kafana'an i 2014 miheca 2 folad miliyas to cingra to hekal, anini (2015) miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad, minokay to tayra ci Wamaan, itira kakarayan maafofo no Tapang. Ka'ayaway sici a nikapolongan onto no Taywan awaayay ko sapadang, matiya ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu to saki tamdawan ato saliongoc no tamdaw mangodo a midamaay a romaay kitakit a tamdaw, o saka ci'icel piti'eran no matayalay tono nikapolongan itiya ho. Miahowid ci Guo Jiaxin Simpuan karorayan to'ek no Taywan, o so'elinay faloco' ato cimacodahay, i matoleday namal mikacaway to nikaolongan no Taywan. Itiya matengil ko pipalemed ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu a sapalemed itiya: "Palemedaen no Wama kiso, sa'icelen iso haw." sanay. Mitolon kako to palemed no Kawas to Taywan, sa'icelen no Taywan. Chen Ju siciw a facebook ( 2015 miheca 5 folad 2 romi'ad. Guo Jiaxin Simpu i 1962 miheca nai Amilika tayni i Taywan, itira i Luo loma' Tinsokiw kiwkay no Posin i Canghua mala simpu no kiwkay. Sarakatay ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu a demak minanam to sowal no Payrang a sowal, pakaynien i Loma tilid no Fangcalay cudad minanam, saka mafana' to sowal no Payrang cingra. Nika itiyaay a kaemangay wawa kalosasowalan no pitilidan o "Safaay ko sowal no Taywan a sowal, kakaay ko sowal no Congko" sanay ko piepec sasiroma, kafahekaan ningra koni. Roma i, masapinang haca ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu, miemet haca ko sifo to mitiliday a fokes, losid at oharateng, onian ko saka caay ka hemhem no faloco', nawhani paretatenga cingra matiniay a pikiwiko o saka lasawad no kalita'angan, onikikayan a ningkiw. Orasaka, pakayni i masongila'ay kiwiko ko palowad to mitiliday, i pipasifana' ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu t okaemangay wawa pakaynien i cuka ko pasowal cangraan: "Cayay ko kai saseti' a matayalay kolong kiso, oya midoedoay to faloco' no niyah a dademakay tamdaw." Pakayni tonini i sakimiemecay a sakowan o awaayay ko ngaha. I 1977 miheca, itiyaay a Chen Ju (27 mihecaan) o nano pidemak to piliyang a onto marepet no Komintang. I piki'adingay itiya, pakayni pisilsil ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu, mala macidahay a fafahiyan ci Chen Ju, mapatayra i Luo loma' Tinsokiw kiwkay no Posin i Canghua misimed. Cecay romi'ad, tosa romi'ad, tolo romi'ad… saka enem romi'ad i semo'otay masafelengay imeng miliyok to pinanaman loma' i, 'afangen ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu cingra, tomangil a mitolon: "Wamaaw! Dipoten konini fafahiyan a wawa, pafelien cingra to macodahay 'icel." Nai 1962 miheca a tayni Taywan, tangasa 1979 miheca tona misimed ci Chen Juan a malaplap pasadak, miwacay ci Guo Jiaxin Simpu to karorayan no Taywan a tamdaw, mafaliyosay a 'orip, madipot ningra ko nikapolongan no mita, midipot t osasapalen, ahowiday, ci Guo Jiaxin Simpu, sanga'ay hato ko hanhan, oya salo'afang iso i fangcalay kanatal o mamirarid mapalafangcal…. Mitiliday o sangsi no Kaocong, Tayciw a tamdaw "Nai Formaso a tilid" Lu Cianhui/Yan Lizhen, kowaping/Dipong a nirina'an: Tusan sya 2012 miheca 7 folad.
S.PHON: == *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u == siməɬ~ɮan ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u i pinanaman ʦi ʦħən *o~u~u. *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u(fr. ro~unaɾɬ~ɮ * b~b~vo~uʦʦiəri)o~u nai "mikapo~utaj to~u mapaɬ~ɮəsaj tamɬ~ɮaw" a kaʦiaŋiɾan i marjkno~uɾɾ kiwkaj, i **** miħəʦa simpo~u~u no~u po~u~uxin ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ i po~u~usin no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua, mafanaʡ paso~uwaɾ to~uno~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ, maɾato~usaaj ko~u siʦian kaitira i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, sarakataj marəpət no~u ko~umintaŋ sifo~u kako~u, paɾafinən, ɬ~ɮipo~utan kako~u to~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj, paso~uwaɾ ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u: "paɾəməɬ~ɮaən no~u wama kiso~u, saʡiʦəɾən iso~u ħaw." saan. i **** miħəʦa, nawħani miso~upəɬ~ɮ kako~u to~u ŋaŋan no~u maro~ufo~uaj to~u siʦian ato~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u a rato~uħ patajra i ro~uma kitakit, o~u miɾinikaj iməŋ ato~u miso~uɾapaj mirəpət i tako~uwanan, saka miɾijaw ħaʦa kako~u miɾimo~uk tajra i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ tinso~ukiw kiwkaj i ʦaŋħo~u~ua. iko~ur, marəpat kako~u, na iko~uran to~unini ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj no~u simpo~u~u tajni tajwan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa, itira to~u kami i nəw jo~urk masaso~uʡaraw. i **** miħəʦa mafafaɾiʦ ko~u sasiikəɬ~ɮ ʦsiʦian, maŋaʡaj to~u ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u tajni i tajwan miɾiso~uʡ tako~u~uwan, ʦaaj ko~u kafanaʡan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ miɾijas to~u ʦiŋra to~u ħəkaɾ, anini (****) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mino~ukaj to~u tajra ʦi wamaan, itira kakarajan maafo~ufo~u no~u tapaŋ. kaʡajawaj siʦi a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u no~u tajwan awaajaj ko~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ, matija ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u to~u saki tamɬ~ɮawan ato~u saɾio~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u a miɬ~ɮamaaj a ro~umaaj kitakit a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u saka ʦiʡiʦəɾ pitiʡəran no~u matajaɾaj to~uno~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan itija ħo~u. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~uan karo~urajan to~uʡək no~u tajwan, o~u so~uʡəɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u ʦimaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj, i mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj namaɾ mikaʦawaj to~u nikao~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan. itija matəŋiɾ ko~u pipaɾəməɬ~ɮ ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ itija: "paɾəməɬ~ɮaən no~u wama kiso~u, saʡiʦəɾən iso~u ħaw." sanaj. mito~uɾo~un kako~u to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas to~u tajwan, saʡiʦəɾən no~u tajwan. ʦħən *o~u~u siʦiw a faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk ( **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u i **** miħəʦa nai amiɾika tajni i tajwan, itira i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ tinso~ukiw kiwkaj no~u po~usin i ʦaŋħo~u~ua maɾa simpo~u~u no~u kiwkaj. sarakataj ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u a ɬ~ɮəmak minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ, pakajniən i ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ minanam, saka mafanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ ʦiŋra. nika itijaaj a kaəmaŋaj wawa kaɾo~usaso~uwaɾan no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan o~u "safaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan a so~uwaɾ, kakaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u" sanaj ko~u piəpəʦ sasiro~uma, kafaħəkaan niŋra ko~uni. ro~uma i, masapinaŋ ħaʦa ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u, miəmət ħaʦa ko~u sifo~u to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a fo~ukəs, ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ at o~uħaratəŋ, o~unian ko~u saka ʦaaj ka ħəmħəm no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, nawħani parətatəŋa ʦiŋra matiniaj a pikiwiko~u o~u saka ɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u kaɾitaʡaŋan, o~unikikajan a niŋkiw. o~urasaka, pakajni i maso~uŋiɾaʡaj kiwiko~u ko~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, i pipasifanaʡ ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u t o~ukaəmaŋaj wawa pakajniən i ʦo~u~uka ko~u paso~uwaɾ ʦaŋraan: "ʦajaj ko~u kai sasətiʡ a matajaɾaj ko~uɾo~uŋ kiso~u, o~uja miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nijaħ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj tamɬ~ɮaw." pakajni to~unini i sakimiəməʦaj a sako~uwan o~u awaajaj ko~u ŋaħa. i **** miħəʦa, itijaaj a ʦħən *o~u~u (** miħəʦaan) o~u nano~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u piɾijaŋ a o~unto~u marəpət no~u ko~umintaŋ. i pikiʡaɬ~ɮiŋaj itija, pakajni pisiɾsiɾ ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u, maɾa maʦiɬ~ɮaħaj a fafaħijan ʦi ʦħən *o~u~u, mapatajra i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ tinso~ukiw kiwkaj no~u po~usin i ʦaŋħo~u~ua misiməɬ~ɮ. ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ* saka ənəm ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i səmo~uʡo~utaj masafəɾəŋaj iməŋ miɾijo~uk to~u pinanaman ɾo~umaʡ i, ʡafaŋən ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u ʦiŋra, to~umaŋiɾ a mito~uɾo~un: "wamaaw! ɬ~ɮipo~utən ko~unini fafaħijan a wawa, pafəɾiən ʦiŋra to~u maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj ʡiʦəɾ." nai **** miħəʦa a tajni tajwan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa to~una misiməɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦħən *o~u~uan a maɾapɾap pasaɬ~ɮak, miwaʦaj ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u to~u karo~urajan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, mafaɾijo~usaj a ʡo~urip, maɬ~ɮipo~ut niŋra ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u mita, miɬ~ɮipo~ut t o~usasapaɾən, aħo~uwiɬ~ɮaj, ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u, saŋaʡaj ħato~u ko~u ħanħan, o~uja saɾo~uʡafaŋ iso~u i faŋʦaɾaj kanataɾ o~u mamirariɬ~ɮ mapaɾafaŋʦaɾ*. mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~u saŋsi no~u kao~uʦo~uŋ, tajʦiw a tamɬ~ɮaw "nai fo~urmaso~u a tiɾiɬ~ɮ" ɾo~u~u ʦianħo~u~ui/jan ɾi*ħən, ko~uwapiŋ/ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a nirinaʡan: to~u~usan sja **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: == Guo Jiaxin Simpu == Simedan ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu i pinanaman ci Chen Ju. Guo Jiaxin Simpu(Fr. Ronald J Boccieri)o nai "Mikapotay to mapadesay tamdaw" a kaciangilan i Maryknoll kiwkay, i 1968 miheca Simpu no Puxin Luo loma' i Pusin no Canghua, mafana' pasowal tono Payrang a sowal, malatosaay ko sician kaitira i Luo loma' no Canghua. I 1977 miheca 6 folad 23 romi'ad, sarakatay marepet no Komintang sifo kako, palafinen, dipotan kako to cecay lipay, pasowal ci Guo Jiaxin Simpu: "Palemedaen no Wama kiso, sa'icelen iso haw." saan. I 1978 miheca, nawhani misoped kako to ngangan no marofoay to sician ato nikapolongan onto a ratoh patayra i roma kitakit, o milinikay imeng ato misolapay mirepet i takowanan, saka miliyaw haca kako milimok tayra i Luo loma' Tinsokiw kiwkay i Canghua. Ikor, marepat kako, na ikoran tonini caay to kanga'ay no Simpu tayni Taywan, tangasa 1987 miheca, itira to kami i New York masaso'araw. I 2000 miheca mafafalic ko sasiiked csician, manga'ay to ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu tayni i Taywan miliso' takuwan, caay ko kafana'an i 2014 miheca 2 folad miliyas to cingra to hekal, anini (2015) miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad, minokay to tayra ci Wamaan, itira kakarayan maafofo no Tapang. Ka'ayaway sici a nikapolongan onto no Taywan awaayay ko sapadang, matiya ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu to saki tamdawan ato saliongoc no tamdaw mangodo a midamaay a romaay kitakit a tamdaw, o saka ci'icel piti'eran no matayalay tono nikapolongan itiya ho. Miahowid ci Guo Jiaxin Simpuan karorayan to'ek no Taywan, o so'elinay faloco' ato cimacodahay, i matoleday namal mikacaway to nikaolongan no Taywan. Itiya matengil ko pipalemed ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu a sapalemed itiya: "Palemedaen no Wama kiso, sa'icelen iso haw." sanay. Mitolon kako to palemed no Kawas to Taywan, sa'icelen no Taywan. Chen Ju siciw a facebook ( 2015 miheca 5 folad 2 romi'ad. Guo Jiaxin Simpu i 1962 miheca nai Amilika tayni i Taywan, itira i Luo loma' Tinsokiw kiwkay no Posin i Canghua mala simpu no kiwkay. Sarakatay ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu a demak minanam to sowal no Payrang a sowal, pakaynien i Loma tilid no Fangcalay cudad minanam, saka mafana' to sowal no Payrang cingra. Nika itiyaay a kaemangay wawa kalosasowalan no pitilidan o "Safaay ko sowal no Taywan a sowal, kakaay ko sowal no Congko" sanay ko piepec sasiroma, kafahekaan ningra koni. Roma i, masapinang haca ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu, miemet haca ko sifo to mitiliday a fokes, losid at oharateng, onian ko saka caay ka hemhem no faloco', nawhani paretatenga cingra matiniay a pikiwiko o saka lasawad no kalita'angan, onikikayan a ningkiw. Orasaka, pakayni i masongila'ay kiwiko ko palowad to mitiliday, i pipasifana' ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu t okaemangay wawa pakaynien i cuka ko pasowal cangraan: "Cayay ko kai saseti' a matayalay kolong kiso, oya midoedoay to faloco' no niyah a dademakay tamdaw." Pakayni tonini i sakimiemecay a sakowan o awaayay ko ngaha. I 1977 miheca, itiyaay a Chen Ju (27 mihecaan) o nano pidemak to piliyang a onto marepet no Komintang. I piki'adingay itiya, pakayni pisilsil ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu, mala macidahay a fafahiyan ci Chen Ju, mapatayra i Luo loma' Tinsokiw kiwkay no Posin i Canghua misimed. Cecay romi'ad, tosa romi'ad, tolo romi'ad… saka enem romi'ad i semo'otay masafelengay imeng miliyok to pinanaman loma' i, 'afangen ni Guo Jiaxin Simpu cingra, tomangil a mitolon: "Wamaaw! Dipoten konini fafahiyan a wawa, pafelien cingra to macodahay 'icel." Nai 1962 miheca a tayni Taywan, tangasa 1979 miheca tona misimed ci Chen Juan a malaplap pasadak, miwacay ci Guo Jiaxin Simpu to karorayan no Taywan a tamdaw, mafaliyosay a 'orip, madipot ningra ko nikapolongan no mita, midipot t osasapalen, ahowiday, ci Guo Jiaxin Simpu, sanga'ay hato ko hanhan, oya salo'afang iso i fangcalay kanatal o mamirarid mapalafangcal…. Mitiliday o sangsi no Kaocong, Tayciw a tamdaw "Nai Formaso a tilid" Lu Cianhui/Yan Lizhen, kowaping/Dipong a nirina'an: Tusan sya 2012 miheca 7 folad.

mapaɬ~ɮəsaj tamɬ~ɮaw" a kaʦiaŋiɾan i marjkno~uɾɾ kiwkaj, i **** miħəʦa simpo~u~u no~u po~u~uxin ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ i po~u~usin no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua, mafanaʡ paso~uwaɾ to~uno~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ, maɾato~usaaj ko~u siʦian kaitira i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, sarakataj marəpət no~u ko~umintaŋ sifo~u kako~u, paɾafinən, ɬ~ɮipo~utan kako~u to~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj, paso~uwaɾ ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u: "paɾəməɬ~ɮaən no~u wama kiso~u, saʡiʦəɾən iso~u ħaw." saan. i **** miħəʦa, nawħani miso~upəɬ~ɮ kako~u to~u ŋaŋan no~u maro~ufo~uaj to~u siʦian ato~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u a rato~uħ patajra i ro~uma kitakit, o~u miɾinikaj iməŋ ato~u miso~uɾapaj mirəpət i tako~uwanan, saka miɾijaw ħaʦa kako~u miɾimo~uk tajra i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ tinso~ukiw kiwkaj i ʦaŋħo~u~ua. iko~ur, marəpat kako~u, na iko~uran to~unini ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj no~u simpo~u~u tajni tajwan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa, itira to~u kami i nəw jo~urk masaso~uʡaraw. i **** miħəʦa mafafaɾiʦ ko~u sasiikəɬ~ɮ ʦsiʦian, maŋaʡaj to~u ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u tajni i tajwan miɾiso~uʡ tako~u~uwan, ʦaaj ko~u kafanaʡan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ miɾijas to~u ʦiŋra to~u ħəkaɾ, anini (****) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mino~ukaj to~u tajra ʦi wamaan, itira kakarajan maafo~ufo~u no~u tapaŋ. kaʡajawaj siʦi a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u no~u tajwan awaajaj ko~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ, matija ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u to~u saki tamɬ~ɮawan ato~u saɾio~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u a miɬ~ɮamaaj a ro~umaaj kitakit a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u saka ʦiʡiʦəɾ pitiʡəran no~u matajaɾaj to~uno~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan itija ħo~u. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~uan karo~urajan to~uʡək no~u tajwan, o~u so~uʡəɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u ʦimaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj, i mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj namaɾ mikaʦawaj to~u nikao~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan. itija matəŋiɾ ko~u pipaɾəməɬ~ɮ ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ itija: "paɾəməɬ~ɮaən no~u wama kiso~u, saʡiʦəɾən iso~u ħaw." sanaj. mito~uɾo~un kako~u to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas to~u tajwan, saʡiʦəɾən no~u tajwan. ʦħən *o~u~u siʦiw a faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk ( **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u i **** miħəʦa nai amiɾika tajni i tajwan, itira i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ tinso~ukiw kiwkaj no~u po~usin i ʦaŋħo~u~ua maɾa simpo~u~u no~u kiwkaj. sarakataj ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u a ɬ~ɮəmak minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ, pakajniən i ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ minanam, saka mafanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ ʦiŋra. nika itijaaj a kaəmaŋaj wawa kaɾo~usaso~uwaɾan no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan o~u "safaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan a so~uwaɾ, kakaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u" sanaj ko~u piəpəʦ sasiro~uma, kafaħəkaan niŋra ko~uni. ro~uma i, masapinaŋ ħaʦa ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u, miəmət ħaʦa ko~u sifo~u to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a fo~ukəs, ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ at o~uħaratəŋ, o~unian ko~u saka ʦaaj ka ħəmħəm no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, nawħani parətatəŋa ʦiŋra matiniaj a pikiwiko~u o~u saka ɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u kaɾitaʡaŋan, o~unikikajan a niŋkiw. o~urasaka, pakajni i maso~uŋiɾaʡaj kiwiko~u ko~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, i pipasifanaʡ ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u t o~ukaəmaŋaj wawa pakajniən i ʦo~u~uka ko~u paso~uwaɾ ʦaŋraan: "ʦajaj ko~u kai sasətiʡ a matajaɾaj ko~uɾo~uŋ kiso~u, o~uja miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nijaħ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj tamɬ~ɮaw." pakajni to~unini i sakimiəməʦaj a sako~uwan o~u awaajaj ko~u ŋaħa. i **** miħəʦa, itijaaj a ʦħən *o~u~u (** miħəʦaan) o~u nano~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u piɾijaŋ a o~unto~u marəpət no~u ko~umintaŋ. i pikiʡaɬ~ɮiŋaj itija, pakajni pisiɾsiɾ ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u, maɾa maʦiɬ~ɮaħaj a fafaħijan ʦi ʦħən *o~u~u, mapatajra i ɾo~u~uo~u ɾo~umaʡ tinso~ukiw kiwkaj no~u po~usin i ʦaŋħo~u~ua misiməɬ~ɮ. ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ* saka ənəm ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i səmo~uʡo~utaj masafəɾəŋaj iməŋ miɾijo~uk to~u pinanaman ɾo~umaʡ i, ʡafaŋən ni *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u ʦiŋra, to~umaŋiɾ a mito~uɾo~un: "wamaaw! ɬ~ɮipo~utən ko~unini fafaħijan a wawa, pafəɾiən ʦiŋra to~u maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj ʡiʦəɾ." nai **** miħəʦa a tajni tajwan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa to~una misiməɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦħən *o~u~uan a maɾapɾap pasaɬ~ɮak, miwaʦaj ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u to~u karo~urajan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, mafaɾijo~usaj a ʡo~urip, maɬ~ɮipo~ut niŋra ko~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u mita, miɬ~ɮipo~ut t o~usasapaɾən, aħo~uwiɬ~ɮaj, ʦi *o~u~uo~u *iaxin simpo~u~u, saŋaʡaj ħato~u ko~u ħanħan, o~uja saɾo~uʡafaŋ iso~u i faŋʦaɾaj kanataɾ o~u mamirariɬ~ɮ mapaɾafaŋʦaɾ*. mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~u saŋsi no~u kao~uʦo~uŋ, tajʦiw a tamɬ~ɮaw "nai fo~urmaso~u a tiɾiɬ~ɮ" ɾo~u~u ʦianħo~u~ui/jan ɾi*ħən, ko~uwapiŋ/ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a nirinaʡan: to~u~usan sja **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ.
